samplingFrame: 41-document stratified corpus spanning four cases (American Revolution, Napoleon, Lincoln, Nazi Germany) under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice, selected via the sacrifice-law-workbench manifest-driven pipeline. PPW #149 records proposed PPW case IDs for American Revolution and Napoleon; both still require case folders before their subsets can be imported. Corpus import into PPW is planned for Milestone 17.
notes: caseIds lists only the two PPW case folders that currently exist (american-civil-war-union, nazi-germany). Proposed mappings for American Revolution and Napoleon are recorded in cases.json as american-revolution and napoleonic-france, but those case folders do not yet exist. No documents imported yet as of Milestone 15; per-corpus folder created in PPW #138. Corpus import scheduled for Milestone 17. Claim promotion is separate from corpus availability and requires PPW review gates.
